title: simpleqol
description: Simple quality of life changes for vanilla Minecraft.
body:
# рҹҢҹ simpleqol Mod Changelog and Feature List

рҹӣ пёҸ A lightweight, server-side Minecraft mod focused on quality-of-life improvements.

рҹҢҗ **Fully server-side**: No client-side installation required.

## Features

### рҹӘ“ Stonecutter Enhancements
- Stonecutter can now cut **normal deepslate** вӣҸпёҸ.
- Stonecutter supports cutting **all  (and wood/stripped) types** рҹҢі.
- CRAFTING TABLE stair recipe now produces 6 stairs on the crafting table
  - Stairs can be created on the stonecutter for 1 of the base material e.g. 1 stone or 1 oak plank.

### рҹҢһрҹҢҷ Custom Day and Night Lengths
- Configure **day** and **night lengths** in real-life minutes вҸ°.
  - Default: **30 minutes** (day), **10 minutes** (night).
  - Commands:
    - `/simpleqol daylength get/set <minutes>`: View or set day length вҳҖпёҸ.
    - `/simpleqol nightlength get/set <minutes>`: View or set night length рҹҢ‘.
  - **Note**: Disables `daynightcycle` gamerule, which may affect mods relying on it вҡ пёҸ.
    - Sleeping to skip nighttime and the `playersleepingpercentage` gamerule remain functional рҹҳҙ.

### рҹҚӮ Custom Leaf Decay Multiplier
- Leaves decay faster. This multiplier is adjustable in the config (1=vanilla).
- Jungle Saplings now drop at the same rate as all other saplings (vanilla behavior was 2.5% for jungle, 5% for all other saplings).

### вҡ“ Respawn Anchor Overhaul
- **Respawn anchors** are usable in **all dimensions** and do not explode рҹҡ«рҹ’Ҙ.
- Players can right click Respawn Anchors to set and unset their spawn points.
- Players respawn at their anchor regardless of the dimension they died in (e.g., die in The End, respawn at their anchor in The Nether) рҹ”„.
- Players with an active respawn anchor cannot set their spawn with a **bed**, but can still sleep to skip the night рҹӣҸпёҸ.
- Multiple players can link to the same respawn anchor рҹ‘Ҙ.
- If a respawn anchor is destroyed, connected playersвҖҷ spawns revert to the **world spawn** рҹҢҚ.
- Respawn anchors remain **lit (charge level 4)** as long as at least one player is linked рҹ’Ў.
- No longer require **glowstone** to function рҹҡ«вңЁ.

### рҹҢҚ Simple Biome Replacement
- Hate a certain biome? Want more of a specific biome? Simple!
- Adjust the simpleqol_config.json to replace biomes **(BEFORE GENERATION)** as you see fit, adding adjusting, or removing them from the config json.
- Default replacement examples include:
    - "minecraft:stony_shore", "minecraft:beach" (**replaces stony_shore with beach**)
    - "minecraft:windswept_gravelly_hills", "minecraft:windswept_hills" (**replaces windswept_gravelly_hills with windswept_hills**)

Set
```
    "biomeReplacements": {
    "minecraft:stony_shore": "minecraft:beach",
    "minecraft:windswept_gravelly_hills": "minecraft:windswept_hills"
  },
```
to
```
"biomeReplacements": {},
```
if you do not wish to replace any biomes.

### рҹҢұ Composting
- **Poisonous potatoes** are now compostable рҹҘ”.

### рҹ‘ҒпёҸвҖҚрҹ—ЁпёҸ Enderman Behavior
- **Enderman griefing** is disabled by default рҹҡ«.
    - Adjustable via config вҡҷпёҸ.

### рҹ§і Ender Chest
- **Ender chests** drop as themselves regardless of the tool used, no silk touch required рҹ”Ё.

### рҹ§¶ Wool Crafting
- **Wool** can be crafted into **4 strings** рҹ§ө.

### рҹ’Ў Plant Lighting
- **Torchflower**, **Pitcher Plant**, and **Eyeblossom** emit light вңЁ.
    - Light levels adjustable via config вҡҷпёҸ.
    - **Note**: Clients only see lighting changes after rejoining the server рҹ”„.

### рҹҚ“ Sweet Berry Bushes
- **Berry bushes** no longer deal damage to players рҹҡ«рҹ’Ҙ (configurable).
- Allows for greater decorative possibilities.

### рҹ‘» Phantom Spawning
- **Phantoms** spawn very rarely in the Overworld and specific End biomes (End Highlands, End Midlands) рҹҸһпёҸ.
    - Customizable spawn weight and pack sizes via config (set to 0 to disable and set doInsomnia to true for vanilla behavior) вҡҷпёҸ.
    - Gamerule `doInsomnia` (spawns Phantoms when player has not slept) is set to **False** by default, adjustable in config рҹҳҙ.

### рҹ–ҘпёҸ Mod Characteristics
- **Fully server-side**: No client-side installation required рҹҢҗ.
- Configurable settings for:
    - Enderman griefing рҹ‘ҒпёҸвҖҚрҹ—ЁпёҸ.
    - Leaf decay multiplier рҹҚӮ.
    - Berry bushes рҹҚ“.
    - Night length рҹҢҷ.
    - Fully customizable biome replacements рҹҢҚ.
    - Plant lighting levels рҹ’Ў.
    - Phantom spawn rates рҹ‘».

## Make sure to also check out my other mod 'simpleskills' on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/simpleskills) or [GitHub](https://github.com/ob-yekt/simpleskills)!
